description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the nicosingh/rpi-dind:latest Docker image, defining two stages: build-branch and build-master, and setting variables DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME, DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY, GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME, GITLAB_REGISTRY. In the build-branch stage add a branch-docker_hub job (tagged rpi) that runs on all branches except master, executing docker login -u nicosingh -p $DOCKERHUB_NICOSINGH_PASSWORD $DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY, docker build -t $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME ., and docker push $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME to publish the image to Docker Hub. Also in build-branch add a branch-gitlab job (tagged rpi) that runs on all branches except master, executing docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $GITLAB_REGISTRY, docker build -t $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME ., and docker push $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME to publish to the GitLab Container Registry. In the build-master stage add a master-docker_hub job (tagged rpi) that runs only on the master branch, executing docker login -u nicosingh -p $DOCKERHUB_NICOSINGH_PASSWORD $DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY, docker build -t $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:latest ., and docker push $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:latest. Also in build-master add a master-gitlab job (tagged rpi) that runs only on master, executing docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $GITLAB_REGISTRY, docker build -t $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:latest ., and docker push $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:latest.
